description_long: This is a stylized, compact biplane with a green and tan camouflage paint scheme, featuring two stacked wings with rounded tips and circular insignia markings. The fuselage is short and robust, with a single enclosed cockpit covered by a blue-tinted canopy situated just behind the upper wing. The nose houses a prominent, multi-blade propeller and a visible engine cowling, both painted in matching camouflage colors. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all with angular, slightly swept shapes. The landing gear consists of two fixed, rectangular main gear legs beneath the lower wing and a small tail skid at the rear. The overall design suggests a vintage or cartoonish military aircraft, likely intended for visual appeal in urban or playful environments.
description: A compact, green-and-tan biplane with stacked wings, a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit, and a prominent front propeller. The design is stylized with fixed landing gear and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stacked biplane wings, blue-tinted cockpit canopy, and the propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual wings, propeller, and the cockpit canopy centered behind the upper wing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same biplane structure, cockpit, and tail details as view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail assembly, fixed landing gear, and the back of the cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a multi-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main gear legs and a rear tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Mid-fuselage, single-seat, enclosed cockpit with a blue-tinted canopy.
